name: Jellyfin
description: Media server — stream movies, TV and music to any device. Open source, no account required.
compose:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/jellyfin:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
    ports:
      - "8096:8096"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/jellyfin:/config
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/media:/media
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Immich
description: Self-hosted Google Photos alternative — automatic phone backup, face recognition, albums, map view.
compose:
services:
  immich-server:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-server:release
    environment:
      - DB_HOSTNAME=immich-db
      - DB_USERNAME=immich
      - DB_PASSWORD=immich
      - DB_DATABASE_NAME=immich
      - REDIS_HOSTNAME=immich-redis
    ports:
      - "2283:2283"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/photos:/usr/src/app/upload
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    depends_on:
      - immich-redis
      - immich-db
    restart: unless-stopped

  immich-machine-learning:
    image: ghcr.io/immich-app/immich-machine-learning:release
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/immich/model-cache:/cache
    restart: unless-stopped

  immich-redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    restart: unless-stopped

  immich-db:
    image: tensorchord/pgvecto-rs:pg14-v0.2.0
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=immich
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=immich
      - POSTGRES_DB=immich
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/immich/db:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Vaultwarden
description: Self-hosted Bitwarden-compatible password manager. Works with the official Bitwarden browser extension and mobile apps.
compose:
services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    user: "1000:1000"
    environment:
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
    ports:
      - "8888:80"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/vaultwarden:/data
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Nextcloud
description: File sync, calendar, contacts — a self-hosted Dropbox/Google Drive. Requires Nextcloud desktop or mobile client.
config_note: Change both 'changeme' database passwords before starting.
compose:
services:
  nextcloud:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/nextcloud:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
    ports:
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/nextcloud:/config
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/shared:/data
    depends_on:
      - nextcloud-db
    restart: unless-stopped

  nextcloud-db:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/mariadb:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=changeme
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_USER=nextcloud
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=changeme
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/nextcloud-db:/config
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Filebrowser
description: Web file manager — browse, upload, download, and manage files in your browser.
compose:
services:
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser:latest
    user: "1000:1000"
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}:/srv
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/filebrowser:/config
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: Reverse proxy with automatic Let's Encrypt SSL — route subdomains to services and enable HTTPS.
config_note: Default login: admin@example.com / changeme — change immediately. Note: port 80 conflicts with Homepage.
compose:
services:
  nginx-proxy-manager:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "81:81"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/nginx-proxy-manager/data:/data
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/nginx-proxy-manager/letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
    restart: unless-stopped

name: qBittorrent
description: Torrent client with web UI. Pairs with Sonarr/Radarr for automated media downloads.
compose:
services:
  qbittorrent:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/qbittorrent:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
      - WEBUI_PORT=8090
    ports:
      - "8090:8090"
      - "6881:6881"
      - "6881:6881/udp"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/qbittorrent:/config
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/downloads:/downloads
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Sonarr + Radarr
description: Automated media management — Sonarr for TV shows, Radarr for movies. Both integrate with qBittorrent and Jellyfin.
compose:
services:
  sonarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/sonarr:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
    ports:
      - "8989:8989"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/sonarr:/config
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/media/tv:/tv
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/downloads:/downloads
    restart: unless-stopped

  radarr:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/radarr:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - TZ=Europe/Oslo
    ports:
      - "7878:7878"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/radarr:/config
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/media/movies:/movies
      - /{{POOL}}/storage/downloads:/downloads
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Uptime Kuma
description: Service monitoring dashboard — shows whether your services are up, sends notifications when something goes down.
compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:latest
    user: "1000:1000"
    ports:
      - "3001:3001"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/uptime-kuma:/app/data
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Gotify
description: Self-hosted push notification server. PinneOS sends disk and ZFS alerts here. Use the Android/iOS app to receive them.
compose:
services:
  gotify:
    image: gotify/server:latest
    user: "1000:1000"
    ports:
      - "8008:80"
    volumes:
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/gotify:/app/data
    restart: unless-stopped

name: Scrutiny
description: SMART disk health dashboard — visual monitoring with historical trends, temperature history, and deterioration alerts.
config_note: Add a 'devices:' entry for each disk you want to monitor (e.g. /dev/sdb:/dev/sdb).
compose:
services:
  scrutiny:
    image: ghcr.io/analogj/scrutiny:master-omnibus
    cap_add:
      - SYS_RAWIO
    ports:
      - "8081:8080"
    volumes:
      - /run/udev:/run/udev:ro
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/scrutiny/config:/opt/scrutiny/config
      - /{{POOL}}/apps/scrutiny/influxdb:/opt/scrutiny/influxdb
    devices:
      - /dev/sda:/dev/sda
    restart: unless-stopped
